title: "Attacking Erika IS attacking Charlie": Candace Owens drags Charlie Kirk’s old support into escalating online firestorm
summary_full: A resurfaced video of Charlie Kirk defending Candace Owens has reignited debate online. In the clip, Kirk calls Owens “the best” and says, “We're on Team Candace.” Owens shared the video, writing that Kirk “always had my back.” However, many social media users criticized her, arguing that her recent attacks on Kirk’s family and organization contradict the loyalty and support he once showed her.
